item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n08","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed directly on the user's requested upstream redesign: it proposed a unified after-sales rules entry, demoted refund/exchange/gift pages to execution pages, structured the rule center, and gave implementation phases. It did not fire a triage/meta-method despite the prompt already asking to stop local page patching, so this negative control earns full direct-execution credit."}
